explanation.patient_text_preview: Patient phenotypes: Spasticity; Hyporeflexia; Generalized hypotonia; Death in infancy; Neonatal death; Abnormal circulating creatine kinase concentration; Increased urinary glycerol
explanation.disease_text_preview: Disease: muscular dystrophy-dystroglycanopathy (congenital without intellectual disability), type B4 Phenotypes: Hypotonia; Motor delay; Abnormal cerebral white matter morphology; Elevated circulating creatine kinase concentration; Generalized muscle weakness; Muscular dystrophy
